summary: Phase 2 (Invoices + Billing + AI Credits + Quick Link) fully validated end-to-end. Backend: 14/14 pytest cases pass (1 intentionally skipped for the 402-when-exhausted case since credits are still available). Frontend: 14/14 UI checks pass — CRM invoices tab, invoice creation, PDF download (34KB %PDF), deal→invoice, deal→contract PDF (36KB %PDF), pricing 3 plans, upgrade→Stripe checkout URL, /billing credits meter, /workspace credits-chip (28/30), Quick Link section on task form with all 3 dropdowns, and confirmed a task POST persists client_id + deal_id + content_item_id. Zero real console errors across 9 routes including /u/:username and /workspace regression. Morning-brief card still renders. Free plan is correctly badged as current for super_admin.

issues: Due-date field uses the browser's default date picker (shows 'mm/dd/yyyy' placeholder) instead of a shadcn calendar / RTL-friendly date picker. Consistency gap with the Arabic-first design.

action_items: (Low priority) TasksBoard.jsx: `<select data-testid="link-client">` options render `{c.name}` which the dev-tools instrumentation wraps in a <span> inside <option>. Browser console emits 'In HTML, %s cannot be a child of %s' hydration warning. Not user-visible and only appears with x-file-name instrumentation attributes, but if the same warning shows outside dev mode, wrapping the name in a text-only expression avoids it (e.g. `{`${c.name}`}` or just `{c.name+''}`).
(Nice-to-have) Replace native date input in TaskForm with shadcn Calendar/Popover to match RTL Arabic UX (Invoices.jsx due_date isn't exposed in the modal — consider adding it later).
critical_code_review_comments: billing_engine.consume_credit performs a users find_one + ai_usage find_one + update — 3 round trips per AI call. Acceptable at MVP scale but a single aggregation or a counter cache on the user doc would be cheaper at 3000/month volumes.

invoice_engine._next_invoice_number uses count_documents to derive the next sequence. Under concurrent writes two POST /crm/invoices calls within the same millisecond can produce identical INV-YYYY-NNNN numbers. Consider a MongoDB `findOneAndUpdate` on a counters collection, or a unique index + retry.

billing_engine.billing_status only activates the plan when the caller polls /status. If the user closes the tab after paying and never returns, the plan never gets set until they poll again. Playbook is fine, but the stripe webhook path (/api/webhook/stripe) does not appear to be wired to an actual handler that also activates the plan — worth verifying.

InvoiceDetail.jsx: `downloadPdf` uses raw fetch and does not surface HTTP errors (only the .catch on the promise chain). If the token is expired the user gets an opaque toast — consider `if (!r.ok) throw`.
Invoices.jsx NewInvoiceModal has no field for currency, notes, or due_date although the backend supports them — cosmetic feature gap.

AICreditGating: /api/ai/assist decrements the credit *before* the LLM call. If the upstream Claude call fails with 500, the user still loses a credit. Consider consuming only on success or refunding on exception.
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest created one additional TEST invoice (INV-2026-000X) with tax=15% total=277.50; another invoice was auto-generated from the existing deal (dec13d85). Also created a TEST_QuickLink_Task then deleted it. No stale test data left except the two extra invoices which are safe to keep.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super_admin dataset now has: 1 client (Alba Cafe 217905a8...), 1 deal (dec13d85..., stage=won, value=USD), 1 content item (1d9a5ebe...), 4+ invoices (INV-2026-0001 tax=15%, INV-2026-0002 from deal, plus new ones from this iteration test run — one has status=paid). super_admin plan=free, credits_used≈2/30 at report time. Stripe checkout for pro and business both return a stripe.com URL successfully — do NOT complete the payment flow, only verify URL. /api/webhook/stripe route existence was NOT verified by this run — flag for future testing if plan activation via webhook becomes important. Playbook path (poll /billing/status/{sid} after redirect) is the currently-supported activation flow.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional failures. Two console noise items and three P3 code review notes above.
